name_cn:
Model 781402
Size 23/21/12cm
Gucci Ophidia hobo shoulder bag
Today's vibe is given by the hobo!!!
This bag really fits into daily life, casual yet stylish.
Large capacity but lightweight and compact, perfectly satisfying daily outings.
Plus, the strap is longer than most shoulder bags and adjustable.
Love at first sight, stylish and practical!
